modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Emails stuck in Outbox and not sending in Outlook

full_description_text:  
My Outlook is not working right.  
Emails are stuck in the Outbox and won't send.  
I see a red 'X' and can't send or receive messages.  
Sometimes people reply, so I think they go through.
short_description: Emails stuck in Outbox and not sending in Outlook
description:
